creator: culot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Sevan,

thank you for submitting this update.
However, there seem to have been a change in the plist as I get an error
when trying to build the package:

http://people.freebsd.org/~culot/tinderbox/7.4-FreeBSD/iplike-2.0.2.log

Could you have a look at it please?

Thanks,
culot@
